data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of grant-level separation per user->biz pair. However, the evidence does not explicitly demonstrate that the separation is enforced, as it only shows that a grant was created with certain permissions. There is no evidence of distinct behavior or checks that confirm the separation of permissions between different businesses for the same user, which is a critical aspect of the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of distinct permission enforcement per user->biz pair.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
